subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename client entity layer from Pulse to Tasks
description:
Rename the client entity layer directory and all hook files/exports from Pulse to Tasks.

## Directory Rename

Rename `apps/client/src/layers/entities/pulse/` to `apps/client/src/layers/entities/tasks/`.

## File Renames

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `model/use-schedules.ts` | `model/use-tasks.ts` |
| `model/use-runs.ts` | `model/use-task-runs.ts` |
| `model/use-pulse-presets.ts` | `model/use-task-templates.ts` |
| `model/use-pulse-preset-dialog.ts` | `model/use-task-template-dialog.ts` |
| `model/use-pulse-config.ts` | `model/use-task-config.ts` |
| `model/use-completed-run-badge.ts` | `model/use-completed-run-badge.ts` (keep name, update internals) |
| `__tests__/use-schedules.test.tsx` | `__tests__/use-tasks.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/use-runs.test.tsx` | `__tests__/use-task-runs.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/use-pulse-preset-dialog.test.ts` | `__tests__/use-task-template-dialog.test.ts` |
| `__tests__/use-pulse-config.test.tsx` | `__tests__/use-task-config.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/use-completed-run-badge.test.ts` | `__tests__/use-completed-run-badge.test.ts` |

## Hook Renames

Inside each file, rename the exported hooks:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `useSchedules()` | `useTasks()` |
| `useCreateSchedule()` | `useCreateTask()` |
| `useUpdateSchedule()` | `useUpdateTask()` |
| `useDeleteSchedule()` | `useDeleteTask()` |
| `useTriggerSchedule()` | `useTriggerTask()` |
| `useRuns()` | `useTaskRuns()` |
| `usePulsePresets()` | `useTaskTemplates()` |
| `usePulsePresetDialog()` | `useTaskTemplateDialog()` |
| `usePulseConfig()` | `useTaskConfig()` |

Update all TanStack Query keys from `['pulse', ...]` or `['schedules', ...]` to `['tasks', ...]` and `['taskRuns', ...]`.

Update Transport method calls inside each hook to use the renamed methods (e.g., `transport.listSchedules()` -> `transport.listTasks()`).

## Update barrel export

Update `apps/client/src/layers/entities/tasks/index.ts` (renamed from `pulse/index.ts`) to export all hooks with their new names.

## Update all consumers

Search for all imports from `@/layers/entities/pulse` across the client codebase and update to `@/layers/entities/tasks`. Update hook call sites to use new names.

Key consumers include:
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/pulse/` (all UI components)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/` (SchedulesView, SessionSidebar)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/` (NeedsAttentionSection, FailedRunDetailSheet)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-status/` (SubsystemCard, use-subsystem-status)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/` (PulsePresetsStep)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/`
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/` (app-store)

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/pulse/` directory no longer exists
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/tasks/` exists with all renamed files
- All hook names updated
- All TanStack Query keys updated
- All consumer imports updated
- All Transport method calls updated
- Test files renamed and updated
activeForm: Renaming client entity layer from Pulse to Tasks
